props.name: size
props.description: Size of the avatar

props.name: showStatus
props.description: Show status indicator on the avatar

props.name: statusColor
props.description: Color of the status indicator

props.name: badgeCount
props.description: Badge count to display on the avatar

props.name: variant
props.description: Color variant for the avatar fallback background

props.name: showIcon
props.description: Show icon instead of text/initials

props.name: variant
props.description: Color variant for the avatar fallback

props.name: children
props.description: Avatar elements to stack

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum number of avatars to display before showing overflow

props.name: size
props.description: Size of all avatars in the stack

props.name: className
props.description: Additional className for the container

props.name: borderColor
props.description:
Border color for the ring around each avatar
- 'panel': Uses panel/card background color (adapts to light/dark mode)
- 'bg': Uses page background color (adapts to light/dark mode)
- 'transparent': No visible ring

props.name: asChild
props.description: Render as child component using Radix Slot

props.name: loading
props.description: Show loading state with spinner icon

props.name: loadingText
props.description: Custom text to display during loading state

props.name: leftIcon
props.description: Icon to display on the left side of the button

props.name: rightIcon
props.description: Icon to display on the right side of the button

props.name: series
props.description: Series definition. Required for `grouped` / `stacked` layouts. When omitted, BarList runs in single-series mode and reads `item.value`.

props.name: layout
props.description: How rows render. `single` → one bar per row. `grouped` → one thin bar per series stacked inside the row. `stacked` → one bar split into series segments. Defaults to `single`.

props.name: header
props.description: Label that sits above the name column (e.g. "Source", "Country", "Channel").

props.name: unit
props.description: Unit shown next to the value inside the tooltip (e.g. "Visits", "Contacts", "Sessions").

props.name: hideZeros
props.description: Hide rows whose total is 0 (default true).

props.name: sort
props.description: Sort ordering. Defaults to `desc`. Multi-series rows sort by total.

props.name: labelWidth
props.description: Width of the name column in pixels. Defaults to 88.

props.name: maxBarWidth
props.description: Pixel width allocated to the longest bar. Bars scale proportionally below this. Defaults to 280.

props.name: formatValue
props.description: Value formatter for both inline value and tooltip.

props.name: colors
props.description: Override the default categorical palette.

props.name: maxVisible
props.description: Show this many chips inline; collapse the rest into a `+N More` hover popover. Default: show all.

props.name: colors
props.description: Override the default categorical palette.

props.name: payload
props.type: { value?: string; dataKey?: string; color?: string; type?: string; }[]

props.name: formatValue
props.type: (value: unknown, key: string, row: T) => React.ReactNode

props.name: payload
props.type: { name?: string; value?: string | number; dataKey?: string; payload?: Record<string, unknown>; color?: string; }[]

props.name: indicator
props.description: Visual treatment for the per-row indicator. Default: `bar` for single-row tooltips, `square` for multi-row.

props.name: compareIndicator
props.description: Style for the comparison row's indicator (when `comparePayload` provided). Default: `dashed`.

props.name: unit
props.description: Suffix appended to the numeric value (e.g. "users", "$").

props.name: comparePayload
props.type: { name?: string; value?: string | number; dataKey?: string; payload?: Record<string, unknown>; color?: string; }[]
props.description: Optional comparison payload (e.g. previous-period values). Renders below the main rows.

props.name: compareLabel
props.description: Optional comparison label override (e.g. previous-period date).

props.name: delta
props.description: When `delta` is supplied, render the delta pill with "from previous period" copy.

props.name: deltaCaption
props.description: Override the comparison-row trailing copy. Default: "from previous period".

props.name: labelFormatter
props.type: (label: React.ReactNode, payload: { name?: string; value?: string | number; dataKey?: string; payload?: Record<string, unknown>; color?: string; }[]) => React.ReactNode

props.name: formatter
props.type: (value: string | number, name: string, item: { name?: string; value?: string | number; dataKey?: string; payload?: Record<string, unknown>; color?: string; }, index: number) => React.ReactNode

props.name: asChild
props.description: Render as child component using Radix Slot

props.name: loading
props.description: Show loading state with spinner icon

props.name: loadingText
props.description: Custom text to display during loading state

props.name: leftIcon
props.description: Icon to display on the left side of the button

props.name: rightIcon
props.description: Icon to display on the right side of the button

props.name: content
props.description: Content to display in the cell. Actions overlay this on hover.

props.name: value
props.description: Selected date value

props.name: hasPresets
props.description: Whether to show preset date options

props.name: presets
props.description: Custom preset options to display

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Input placeholder

props.name: isRange
props.description: Allow range selection

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the input is disabled

props.name: dateFormat
props.description: Format string for date display

props.name: disabledDays
props.description: Matcher to disable specific dates

props.name: startMonth
props.description: Earliest date that can be displayed or selected

props.name: endMonth
props.description: Latest date that can be displayed or selected

props.name: className
props.description: Additional className for the trigger

props.name: triggerType
props.description: Trigger type - 'button' or 'input'

props.name: captionLayout
props.description:
Caption layout for the calendar header
- 'label': static month/year label (default)
- 'dropdown': month and year dropdowns
- 'dropdown-months': month dropdown only
- 'dropdown-years': year dropdown only
- 'buttons': navigation buttons (same as label)
Note: dropdown layouts require startMonth and endMonth to define the range.

props.name: showTime
props.description: Show a time picker beside the calendar. Only applies to single-date mode.

props.name: config
props.description: Dialog configuration including dialog registry and default settings

props.name: children
props.type: React.ReactNode & (React.ReactElement<DialogStackChildProps, string | React.JSXElementConstructor<any>> | React.ReactElement<DialogStackChildProps, string | React.JSXElementConstructor<any>>[])

props.name: containerProps
props.type: { ref: (node: HTMLElement) => void; style: React.CSSProperties; 'data-sortable-item-id': string; }
props.description:
Spread onto the element that should be the grid/list child. Carries the
dnd-kit node ref + transform/transition styles. The consumer's root takes
the gridColumn / span styling so the layout flows correctly.

props.name: dragHandleProps
props.type: { ref: (node: HTMLElement) => void; attributes: DraggableAttributes; listeners: SyntheticListenerMap; 'data-drag-handle': true; }
props.description:
Spread onto the drag-handle button. Carries the dnd-kit activator ref +
pointer/keyboard listeners. Use a real `<button>` so keyboard activation works.

props.name: asChild
props.description: Render as child component using Radix Slot

props.name: loading
props.description: Show loading state with spinning refresh icon

props.name: icon
props.description: The icon element to display (typically from react-icons/md)

props.name: icon
props.description: The icon element to render (e.g., from react-icons/md)

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label for screen readers. If omitted, icon is hidden from AT.

props.name: fill
props.description: Primary color token suffix (maps to CSS var --color-<fill>). Default: 'ink'

props.name: fillSecondary
props.description:
Secondary color token suffix for two-tone icons. If omitted, defaults to the
primary fill with 60% opacity via CSS.

props.name: label
props.description: Metric label — rendered uppercase in caps style.

props.name: delta
props.description: Numeric delta or pre-formatted string (e.g. "+8.4%").

props.name: logoInToggle
props.description:
Render the brand logo inside the sidebar toggle button (Layout 2).
Hides the standalone brand and shows logo + hamburger in the toggle.

props.name: layout
props.description: Which application shell to render.

props.name: mainNavItems
props.description: Navigation items for `dual-sidebar` (`SideNavigation`).

props.name: sidebar
props.description: Left navigation panel — required for `sidebar-collapsible`.

props.name: pageSection
props.description: Props forwarded to `PageSection`. Variant is set automatically from `layout`.

props.name: sidebarConfig
props.description: SidebarProvider config (dual-sidebar + sidebar-collapsible/hidden when wrapped).

props.name: primaryAction
props.type: { label: string; href?: string; onClick?: () => void; }

props.name: titlePlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder text when title is empty

props.name: currentStep
props.description: Current step index (0-based). If not provided, reads from Stepper context.

props.name: totalSteps
props.description: Total number of steps. If not provided, reads from Stepper context.

props.name: steps
props.description:
Array of step definitions for the step indicators.
If not provided and within Stepper context, uses context steps.

props.name: showSidebarToggle
props.description: Whether to show the secondary sidebar toggle button

props.name: stepsContent
props.description: Custom content to render in the steps area (overrides default step indicators)

props.name: logoInToggle
props.description:
Render the brand logo inside the sidebar toggle button (Layout 2).
Hides the standalone brand and shows logo + hamburger in the toggle.

props.name: loading
props.description: Show loading state with spinner icon

props.name: loadingText
props.description: Custom text to display during loading state

props.name: leftIcon
props.description: Icon to display on the left side of the button

props.name: rightIcon
props.description: Icon to display on the right side of the button

props.name: value
props.description:
Currently selected date (month + year).
Only the month and year components are considered.

props.name: minYear
props.description: Minimum selectable year

props.name: maxYear
props.description: Maximum selectable year

props.name: asChild
props.description: Render as child component using Radix Slot

props.name: loading
props.description: Show loading state with spinner icon

props.name: loadingText
props.description: Custom text to display during loading state

props.name: leftIcon
props.description: Icon to display on the left side of the button

props.name: rightIcon
props.description: Icon to display on the right side of the button

props.name: indicator
props.description: 'check' = checkmark on the right (default). 'checkbox' = checkbox on the left.

props.name: indicator
props.description: 'check' = checkmark on the right (default). 'checkbox' = checkbox on the left.

props.name: maxTags
props.description: Max visible tags in the trigger. 0 = show all (default).

props.name: indicator
props.description: 'check' = checkmark on the right (default). 'checkbox' = checkbox on the left.

props.name: showWordmark
props.description: Show wordmark beside the mark. Default: true

props.name: inverted
props.description: Use light text for dark sidebars. Default: false

props.name: iconOutlined
props.description: Outlined icon - shown by default

props.name: iconFilled
props.description: Filled icon - shown on hover and active state. If not provided, iconOutlined stays visible

props.name: children
props.description: The title text

props.name: hideToggle
props.description: Hide the collapse/expand toggle button. Default: `false` (toggle is shown).

props.name: className
props.description: Custom className for the outer wrapper

props.name: animationDuration
props.description: Animation duration in ms (desktop only)

props.name: className
props.description: Custom className for the panel wrapper

props.name: children
props.description:
Compose with `SidebarPanelHeader`, `SidebarPanelContent`,
and `SidebarPanelFooter`. Flexbox handles the layout automatically.

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the panel when open (desktop). Default: 224px

props.name: mobileMode
props.description:
Controls mobile behaviour.
- `'sheet'` (default) — renders panel content inside a side-sliding Sheet overlay.
- `'hidden'` — the panel is completely hidden on mobile (renders nothing).

props.name: appearance
props.description: Visual theme for navigation surfaces. Figma primary nav uses `dark`.

props.name: collapseMode
props.description:
Desktop collapse behaviour.
- `'hide'` (default) — collapses to zero width (fully hidden).
- `'rail'` — minimizes to a narrow icon rail (Layout 1). Requires `logo`
  to render the brand mark in the rail.

props.name: logo
props.description: Brand mark node rendered at the top of the collapsed icon rail (`collapseMode="rail"`).

props.name: railWidth
props.description: Width of the collapsed icon rail (`collapseMode="rail"`). Default: 64px.

props.name: appearance
props.description: Primary rail + secondary panel theme. Figma dual-sidebar uses `dark`.

props.name: label
props.description:
Accessible label (always used for aria-label).
When `showLabel` is true, the label is also rendered visually.

props.name: showLabel
props.description: Render the label text visually next to the spinner.

props.name: value
props.description: The value for the selected tab, if controlled

props.name: activationMode
props.description: Whether a tab is activated automatically or manually.

props.name: filters
props.description: Filter controls rendered on a second row of CardHeader (Select, DatePicker, etc.).

props.name: actions
props.description: Trailing controls rendered to the right of the title (IconButton, menu).

props.name: footer
props.description: Footer slot rendered below CardContent. Use for Pagination on table widgets.

props.name: dragHandleProps
props.type: { ref: (node: HTMLElement) => void; attributes: DraggableAttributes; listeners: SyntheticListenerMap; 'data-drag-handle': true; }
props.description:
dnd-kit drag handle props from `SortableGrid` / `SortableItem` render callback.
When present, Widget renders the drag-handle button and wires it to dnd-kit.
Omit when the Widget is not part of a sortable context.

props.name: dragHandleLabel
props.description: Override the drag handle aria-label. Only applies when `dragHandleProps` is set.

props.name: hideDragHandle
props.description: Hide the visible drag handle button while keeping the dnd-kit listeners attached.

props.name: isDragging
props.description: Visually indicate the widget is currently being dragged. Wired by the SortableGrid render callback.

props.name: isDropTarget
props.description: Visually indicate this widget is the active drop target.

props.name: className
props.description: Class applied to the underlying Card.

props.name: headerClassName
props.description: Class applied to CardHeader.

props.name: contentClassName
props.description: Class applied to CardContent.

props.name: footerClassName
props.description: Class applied to footer wrapper.

props.name: outsideScroll
props.description:
When true the overlay becomes the scroll container — the dialog grows naturally
 and the user scrolls the backdrop rather than an internal content area.

When true the dialog gets a max-height and switches to flex-col layout so an
 internal ScrollArea can expand while the header and footer stay pinned.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled array of tag values.

props.name: displayValue
props.description: Function to convert a tag value to its display string representation.

props.name: addOnPaste
props.description: Enable adding tags by pasting text, which will be split by the delimiter.

props.name: addOnTab
props.description: Enable adding tags when Tab key is pressed.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the entire tags input.

props.name: editable
props.description: Allow editing of existing tags

props.name: loop
props.description: Enable wrapping focus from last to first tag and vice versa.

props.name: blurBehavior
props.description:
Behavior when the input loses focus.
- "add": Add the current input value as a new tag.
- "clear": Reset the input field, removing its value.
By default, the input value will stay in the input field.
Can be overridden by the preventDefault() call in the input's onBlur handler.

props.name: delimiter
props.description: Character used to split pasted text into multiple tags.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum number of tags allowed.

props.name: required
props.description: Whether the field is required in a form context.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Whether the tags input is read-only.

props.name: children
props.description:
The content of the tags input.

Can be a function that receives the current value as an argument,
or a React node.

props.name: name
props.description: Name of the form field when used in a form.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the tags input.

props.name: asChild
props.description: Whether to render the wrapped component and merge their props.

props.name: asChild
props.description: Whether to render the wrapped component and merge their props.

props.name: asChild
props.description: Whether to render the wrapped component and merge their props.

props.name: value
props.description: The value of the item.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the item is disabled.

props.name: asChild
props.description: Whether to render the wrapped component and merge their props.

props.name: forceMount
props.description:
Whether the clear button should always be rendered.

Can be used to animate the enter and exit of the clear button.

props.name: asChild
props.description: Whether to render the wrapped component and merge their props.

props.name: value
props.description: A string value for the toggle group item. All items within a toggle group should use a unique value.

props.name: pressed
props.description: The controlled state of the toggle.

props.name: defaultPressed
props.description:
The state of the toggle when initially rendered. Use `defaultPressed`
if you do not need to control the state of the toggle.
